propositions: Add an IntrospectionTokenVerifier that POSTs opaque tokens to an RFC 7662 /introspect endpoint with client authentication and accepts only active:true, mapping the response into an AccessToken.

Register flat auth_introspection_* config keys in McpConfig and _SECTIONS['mcp], deriving REBAR_MCP_AUTH_INTROSPECTION_* env-var names into MCP_ENV_VARS and server.json so the manifest drift check passes.
Enforce fail-closed transport: non-200 status, timeout, or malformed response (invalid JSON or missing boolean active) raises and never yields acceptance.
Validate audience against auth_resource_server_url supporting string or array aud forms, rejecting absent aud by default unless auth_introspection_allow_missing_aud=true.

Apply construction-time security guards: HTTPS-only endpoint, reject private/link-local hosts unless allow_private_host, require a non-empty secret from the named env var, and use bounded HTTP timeouts.
Map scope (space-delimited string) to a scopes list and set expires_at from exp, using None when exp is absent and never emitting 0; no caching so every request re-introspects for instant revocation.
